---
title: "‘Fast Life and High Life’"
---

## ‘Fast Life and High Life’
**Date:** 1865
**Imprint:** <i>Saturday Review</i> 20 (19 August 1865) 231-3

### Notes

The article censures the glamorising of the libertine and the prostitute in recent fiction.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
